scope: wave2 fan-out migration: only the latest-rates stream is declaratively expressible; the daily-historical exchange_rates stream (date-by-date iteration, one request per ISO date, within a single Read call) and the symbols stream (a {code: name} map exploded into one record per key) both need engine mechanisms this Tier-1-only wave does not have — see docs.md Known limits

excluded.reason: date-by-date iteration over a start_date..end_date window within a single Read call has no declarative pagination/looping equivalent (not a body-token/page-number/offset shape); requires a StreamHook, forbidden in this JSON-only wave

the response is a {code: display_name} map that legacy explodes into one record per currency code; the declarative records-extraction dialect supports array-of-objects or single-object shapes only, not map-key explosion — an ENGINE_GAP, not currently expressible in streams.json alone
